# Blog Post Portal — Detailed Architectural Blueprint

## Executive Summary

A full-stack, AI-powered blog post portal that combines professional content creation tools with an entertaining, engaging user experience. The platform features real-time AI writing assistance, rich media support, advanced SEO optimization, social collaboration, and a polished editorial workflow — all built on a modern, scalable architecture.

---

## 1. Technology Stack (Latest Versions)

### Frontend
| Layer | Technology | Version |
|---|---|---|
| Framework | Next.js (App Router) | 15.x |
| Language | TypeScript | 5.x |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui | 4.x / latest |
| Rich Text Editor | TipTap | 2.x |
| State Management | Zustand + TanStack Query | 5.x / 5.x |
| Animations | Framer Motion | 11.x |
| Forms | React Hook Form + Zod | 7.x / 3.x |
| Charts/Analytics | Recharts | 2.x |
| Icons | Lucide React | latest |
| Syntax Highlight | Shiki | 1.x |
| Drag & Drop | @dnd-kit | 6.x |

### Backend
| Layer | Technology | Version |
|---|---|---|
| Runtime | Node.js | 22.x LTS |
| API Framework | Hono.js | 4.x |
| ORM | Drizzle ORM | 0.30.x |
| Database | PostgreSQL | 16.x |
| Cache | Redis (Upstash) | 7.x |
| Search | Meilisearch | 1.x |
| Queue | BullMQ | 5.x |
| File Storage | Cloudflare R2 + Cloudinary | latest |
| Auth | Clerk | latest |
| AI | Vercel AI SDK + OpenAI GPT-4o | latest |
| Email | Resend | latest |

### Infrastructure
| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Hosting | Vercel (Frontend + Edge Functions) |
| Database Host | Neon (Serverless PostgreSQL) |
| Container | Docker + Docker Compose (dev) |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions |
| Monitoring | Sentry + Vercel Analytics |
| CDN | Cloudflare |

---

## 2. System Architecture Overview

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        CLIENT LAYER                             │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │  Next.js App │  │  PWA Shell   │  │  Mobile Responsive   │  │
│  │  (App Router)│  │  (Offline)   │  │  (Tailwind/shadcn)   │  │
│  └──────┬───────┘  └──────┬───────┘  └──────────┬───────────┘  │
└─────────┼─────────────────┼────────────────────-─┼─────────────┘
          │                 │                       │
          ▼                 ▼                       ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      EDGE / API LAYER                           │
│  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │  Hono.js API │  │  Next.js     │  │  Vercel AI SDK       │  │
│  │  (REST+RPC)  │  │  Server      │  │  Streaming Endpoints │  │
│  │              │  │  Actions     │  │                      │  │
│  └──────┬───────┘  └──────┬───────┘  └──────────┬───────────┘  │
└─────────┼─────────────────┼─────────────────────-┼─────────────┘
          │                 │                       │
          ▼                 ▼                       ▼
┌─────────────────────
